diagnose.instructions: Read the task description. Use the campaign executor to check service status and read logs. Identify the root cause. Do NOT modify anything — destructive tools are structurally blocked at this phase. The platform API is available for read-only actions.

investigate.instructions: Investigate the root cause further. Check environment variables, test connections. Still read-only — do NOT modify anything. The campaign executor recitation block preserves investigation state across iterations.

propose_fix.instructions: Propose the fix. Describe exactly what you will change and why. Do NOT execute the fix yet. Write your proposal as text output. The approval gate will require human sign-off before execution.

approve_fix.instructions: RATCHETED DOD v1: auto-verificar seguro/específico/reversible/sin-efectos-colaterales. Si cumple → APPROVED. Si no → REJECTED.

execute_fix.instructions: Execute the approved fix. Do NOT use destructive commands. The verification gate will confirm the fix works before completing.

verify.instructions: Verify the fix worked. Test the connection, check service status, review logs. The campaign executor's verification gate blocks completion until the fix is confirmed working.

review.instructions: Evaluator-optimizer: auto-crítica del fix. ¿Correctitud? ¿Simplicidad? ¿Consistencia? ¿efectos secundarios? Máximo 2 iteraciones.

accept.instructions: RATCHETED DOD v${dod_version}. V1: contrato ✅, output validado ✅, blast radius verificado ✅, deuda técnica identificada ✅, documentación actualizada ✅. V2+: +ponytail-review sin findings, +test-coverage. V3+: +no secrets, +conventional-commit validado. Leer dod_version del workflow. Si todas ✅ → ACCEPTED.

close.instructions: git add -p + git commit con Conventional Commits. skill progreso (Trigger 1). Context Save Point.
